Functions for retrieving compositor animations for app transitions.

# Purpose
This C source code file defines two functions related to compositor animations in a shell environment. The functions [`shell_get_close_compositor_animation`](<#shell_get_close_compositor_animation>) and [`shell_get_open_compositor_animation`](<#shell_get_open_compositor_animation>) are designed to retrieve transition animations when closing and opening applications, respectively. Both functions take two parameters of type `AppInstallId`, representing the current and next application IDs, and return a pointer to a `CompositorTransition` structure. Currently, both functions return `NULL`, indicating that no specific animation is provided. The file includes headers for shell functionality and application installation types, suggesting integration with a larger system managing application processes and transitions.
# Imports and Dependencies

---
- `shell/shell.h`
- `process_management/app_install_types.h`
- `stddef.h`


# Functions

---
### shell\_get\_close\_compositor\_animation<!-- {{#callable:shell_get_close_compositor_animation}} -->
[View Source →](<../../../../../../src/fw/shell/prf/shell.c#L23>)

Returns a null pointer for a compositor transition when closing an application.
- **Inputs**:
    - ``current_app_id``: The application ID of the currently running application.
    - ``next_app_id``: The application ID of the next application to be run.
- **Logic and Control Flow**:
    - Returns `NULL` immediately without performing any operations.
- **Output**: A null pointer of type `const CompositorTransition*`.


---
### shell\_get\_open\_compositor\_animation<!-- {{#callable:shell_get_open_compositor_animation}} -->
[View Source →](<../../../../../../src/fw/shell/prf/shell.c#L28>)

Returns a null pointer for an open compositor animation transition.
- **Inputs**:
    - `current_app_id`: The application ID of the currently running application.
    - `next_app_id`: The application ID of the next application to be opened.
- **Logic and Control Flow**:
    - Returns `NULL` immediately without performing any operations.
- **Output**: A null pointer of type `const CompositorTransition*`.
